subject: Escalation: urban takeover blockers for London | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-2221
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in London. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-2221. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
